title: OpenAQ India stations snapshot
description: Contract for data/realtime/openaq_india/latest.json — air quality monitoring station metadata and latest readings across India from OpenAQ v3.

generated_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (Z-suffixed) when the snapshot was written. Stamped by scrapers/lib/storage.py:write_latest_snapshot().

name.description: Station name as reported by OpenAQ.

locality.description: City or area the station belongs to; may be empty for some stations.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (always 'IN' for this feed).

latitude.description: Station latitude. Records with null coordinates are filtered out by the scraper before storage, so this field is always a number in the snapshot.

longitude.description: Station longitude. Records with null coordinates are filtered out by the scraper before storage, so this field is always a number in the snapshot.

is_mobile.description: True if this is a mobile monitoring platform.

is_monitor.description: True if this is a regulatory-grade reference monitor.

sensors.description: Latest sensor readings for this station. Each entry represents one parameter (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, etc.).

lastValue.description: Most recent sensor reading value, or null when OpenAQ has no recent data for this sensor.

datetimeLast.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the last reading; may be empty.

provider.description: Data provider name within OpenAQ (e.g. 'CPCB', 'AirNow'); may be empty.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for the station (e.g. 'Asia/Kolkata'); may be empty.
